channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Republicans scramble to fund Secret Service after Trump assassination attempt amid record-breaking shutdown
item.description: Republicans demanded swift Secret Service funding after the third apparent assassination attempt on Trump amid the DHS shutdown.

item.title: King Charles set for historic address to Congress in first US visit as monarch
item.description: King Charles is set to address Congress during his U.S. state visit, becoming only the second British royal to speak before the legislative body.

item.title: Jimmy Kimmel and Others Continue Their Dehumanization Campaign Against Conservatives
Top Trump official ignites heated exchange after stumping House Dem on landmark SCOTUS cases
item.description: Lee Zeldin and Rep. Rosa DeLauro sparred over climate change and landmark Supreme Court cases during a heated EPA budget hearing on Capitol Hill Monda...
